name: Integration - Retrieval and LLM Workflow
description: Tests the integration between RetrievalClient, LLMClient, and DomainLogic by simulating a full question-answer workflow.
input: A valid question string passed to ApplicationOrchestrator.process_question() with all dependencies mocked to return expected values.
success_criteria: RetrievalClient.retrieve_chunks is called and returns non-empty list
LLMClient.generate_answer is called with correct prompt/context
